          395

          Grave of prophet prepared by?

          Correct Answer: Hazrat Abu Talha
          Show explanation
          Explanation


          The Tomb of Muḥammad (d. 632) in Medina, Saudi Arabia.

          396

          What was the kunnlyyat of Hazrat abu bakar (ra)?

          Correct Answer: Abu Abdullah
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Abu Bakr  was a sahabi, one of the companions of Muhammad and the first Caliph of Islam.

          He was also Muhammad's father-in-law through Aisha.

          His real name was Abdullah or Abul-Kaaba and Abu Bakr was his kunya.

          397

          Hazrat ___ is known as first dervish

          Correct Answer: Abuzir Ghaffari
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Abu Dharr Al-Ghifari was the fourth or fifth person converting to Islam, and from the Muhajirun.

          He belonged to the Banu Ghifar, the Kinanah tribe.

          He died in 652 CE, at Al-Rabadha in Medina.

          398

          To which Prophet Muslim Ummah belongs ?

          Correct Answer: Hazrat Muhammad
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Purpose of the ummah was to be based on religion by following the commands of God, rather than kinship.

          Ummah is meant to transcend national, racial, and class divisions to unite all Muslims.

          The last prophet in Islam is Muhammad ibn Abdullah, whom Muslims believe to be the "Seal of the Prophets"

          399

          The Ghazwa _____ was fought against Bani Salba and Bani Muharba?

          Correct Answer: Ghatfan
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          The Ghatafan are a massive ancient hijazi tribe north east of Medina and from them come the tribes of Banu Abs, Banu Dhubyan and Ashja'. They were one of the Arab tribes that interacted with Muhammad. They are notable for allying themselves with the Quraysh in the Battle of the Trench.
          400

          Hazrat Ishaaq (A.S) was the prophet of______?

          Correct Answer: Jews
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          As in Judaism and Christianity, Islam maintains that Isaac was the son of the patriarch and prophet Abraham from his wife Sarah.

          401

          Which prophet would not eat food without guest?

          Correct Answer: Hazrat Ibrahim (AH)
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Hazrat Ibrahim As Known As Father Of Prophet.
          Hazrat Ibrahim, was given the title ‘           خليل الله’ KHALILULLAH’, which means ‘the friend of Allah’.
          402

          What was the Age of prophet (PBUH) when Abu Talib took his Custody ?

          Correct Answer: 8
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          When Muhammad reached eight years of age, Abd al-Muttalib died.

          Abu talib  Muhammad's uncles was to take him in.

          403

          In which year the Holy Prophet (PBUH) performed the Pilgrimage?

          Correct Answer: 10 A.H
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Hajj Compulsory 9 Hijri

          Hajj performed Now Muslims 9 Zihaj

           

          The Farewell Pilgrimage (ٱلْحَجّ ٱلْوَدَاع), 632 CE (10 AH), is the final and only Hajj ('Pilgrimage') in which the (Prophet) Muhammad participated.

           

          The Prophet Muhammad carried out the first pilgrimage (Umrah) to Mecca in AD 628, with 1,400 followers by his side

           

          404

          What is relation between Hazrat Ibrahim and Hazrat Loot?

          Correct Answer: Nephew
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Prophet Lut was the paternal nephew of Prophet Ibrahim.

          The grave of Prophet Lot is inside a mosque in Beni Naim village in West Bank.


          Ibrahim ibn Muhammad Dhu al-Hijjah 8 AH ; c. March/April 630 CE

          Medina

          SH1--8-2023

          405

          What are the second 10 days of Ramadan called?

          Correct Answer: Forgiveness
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          First 10 Days of Ramadan ----- Mercy

          Middle 10 Days of Ramadan ------ Forgiveness.

          Last 10 Days of Ramadan------- Refuge.

          406

          Which surah is called Al-Hame.

          Correct Answer: Al-baqra
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Al-baqra        البقرہ  

          407

          What are the conditions that allow Muslims not to fast during Ramadan?

          Correct Answer: Health
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Not required to fast during Ramadan are 

          Elderly, 

          Women that are pregnant, nursing, and/or menstruating

          People travelling

          Those who are stricken with an illness

          Those who are forced to break their fast out of coercion.

          408

          Maximum Verses/Ayats in a surah in Holy Quran are____?

          Correct Answer: 286
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          The shortest chapter Al-Kawthar has only three verses

          The longest Surah Al-Baqara contains 286 verses.
          409

          ___ lifted zakat on horses?

          Correct Answer: Hazrat Ali
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Hazrat Umar levied zakat on horese and Hazrat Ali lifted zakat on horses.

          literal meaning of the word being 'to cleanse,' Muslims believe that paying zakat purifies, increases and blesses the remainder of their wealth.
          410

          Name the prophet whose wife does not believe on Tauheed?

          Correct Answer: Noah
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          The name of Noah's wife was Umzarah bint Barakil but this cannot be confirmed.

          ABOUT HAZRAT NOAH

          The duration of Tofaan e Noah was around 6 months.

          After the 2242 years of Hazrat Adam A.S, the event of Toofan-e-Noah occurred.

           About 80 people were with him in the boat.

          Hazrat Noah lived for 950 years.

          Noah was sent to Iraq.

          Nooh is called predecessor, Naji Ullah; Shaikh ul Ambiya.

          Abu ul Bashr Sani is the title of Noah.

          After toofan-e-nooh, the city established was Khasran


          Lineage of several prophets
          according to Islamic tradition

           
          Adam
          Shīth (Seth)
          Nūḥ (Noah)
          Ibrāhīm (Abraham)
          Ismāʿīl (Ishmael)Iṣḥāq (Isaac)
          Mūsa (Moses)
          ʿĪsā (Jesus)
          Muhammad


          411

          At what age salah is made compulsory for a muslim child?

          Correct Answer: 7 years
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Salat Juma became Farz in Madina. Five salat made compulsory in 10th Hijri .

          412

          Each surah of Quran contains verses what are they called in Arabic?

          Correct Answer: Ayat
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Totally there are 6666 verses in the Quran. Consequently, the expression “Quran has 6666 verses.” is based on the mentioned points.

          Opinion of Kufa, all Qurans consist of 6236 verses.

          413

          What ket resource at Badr were Muslim able to cut off from the enemy?

          Correct Answer: Wells
          Show explanation
          Explanation


          The Battle of Badr also referred to as The Day of the Criterion.

          It was fought on Tuesday, 13 March 624 CE (17 Ramadan, 2 AH), near  city of Badr.

          14 Muslims were killed in Battle of Badr.

          70 Kufar killed, 70 prisoners.

          It is mentioned in Surat Al-Anfal while talking about the battle of Badr that Allah Almighty promised the Muslims to reinforce them with 1,000 angels.

          414

          The government of Pakistan has fixed the nisab of zakat at _________ rupees for lunar year 1441-42 Hijri?

          Correct Answer: Rs80,933
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          People having Rs80,933 balance in savings, profit and loss sharing or similar bank accounts on the first day of Ramazan will have 2.5% zakat deducted on their total balance.
          415

          What is the name of the dog in Surah Kahf?

          Correct Answer: Qitmeer
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Qitmeer is the name of the dog in Surah Kahf.

          The word "kahf" means "the cave in the mountain"

          the sura is named "kahf" because it speaks about the story of the Companions of the Cave

          The cave of Ashab e Kahaf is located in Jordan.

          Ashab e Kahf slept for 309 years

          The number of Ashab-e-Kahf was 7

          The story of Ashab al-Kahf is narrated in the eighteenth chapter of the Quran, called “al-Kahf”  In verses 9-26

          416

          Maizban-e-Rasool ﷺ is the title of ____?

          Correct Answer: Hazrat Abu Ayub Ansari (رضہ)
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Abu Ayyub al-Ansari called Maizban-e-Rasool ﷺ

          Abu Ayyub al-Ansari Born: 576 AD, Medina, Saudi Arabia
          Abu Ayyub al-Ansari Died:           674 AD.
          Abu Ayyub al-Ansari Full name:           Khalid bin Zayd bin Kulayb
          Abu Ayyub al-Ansari Place of burial:           Istanbul, Turkey
          417

          Which Surah is called The Heifer in Quran?

          Correct Answer: Al-Baqarah
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Heifer meaning cow

          Surah Baqarah is the Longest chapter of the Quran.
          418

          Battle of ZALAQA was fought between Alfanso VI and Yousaf bin Tashfeen in ____?

          Correct Answer: 1086
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Date of The Battle of Sagrajas: October 23, 1086
          Location of The Battle of Sagrajas:           Badajoz, Spain
          419

          Bahr-ul-Jud is the title of ____?

          Correct Answer: Hazrat Abdullah bin Jaffar (رضہ)
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Hazrat Abdullah bin Jaffar (رضہ), called as “Bahrul Joud” which means an ocean of charity
          420

          What is the name of lady, whose Father Husband Brother and Son all were Prophets?

          Correct Answer: Layya bint Yaqub
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Layyā bint Ya'qūb – her father was Ya'qūb عليه السلام ;

          her husband was Ayyūb عليه السلام ;

          her brother was Yūsuf عليه السلام ; 

          her son was Ẓul Kifl عليه السلام .
          421

          Payment of Mehr to wife is ___?

          Correct Answer: Obligatory
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          the hadith mahr is the amount to be paid by the groom to the bride at the time of marriage,
          422

          In which Islamic month Farz prayer is equal to 70 Farz prayer?

          Correct Answer: Ramadan
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Ramadan, is the ninth month of the Islamic calendar.

          In Ramadan, Nafal prayer is equal to Farz prayer
          423

          What is the name of 22nd Para of Holy Quran?

          Correct Answer: Wa Manyaqnut (وَمَنْ يَقْنُتْ)
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Wa Manyaqnut (وَمَنْ يَقْنُتْ), is the 22nd Para of Holy Quran
          424

          What is the name of 30th Para of Holy Qur’an?

          Correct Answer: Amma Yatasa’aloon
          Show explanation
          Explanation


          28 قَدْ سَمِعَ اللَّهُ           Qadd Sami Allah .
          29 تَبَارَكَ الَّذِي           Tabarakallazi .
          30 عَمَّ يَتَسَاءَلُونَ           Amma Yatasa’aloon

          425

          Which is the most disliked place by Allah Taala?

          Correct Answer: Bazar
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          The loved place of ALLAH is mosque and mostly dislike market places.
          426

          The pre requisite of Fasting is______?

          Correct Answer: Self-control
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Fasting requires the abstinence from food and drink.

          Fasting the month of Ramadān was made obligatory (wājib)

          Fasting make obligatory in 2nd Hijra.
          427

          What is the name of 12th Para of Holy Quran?

          Correct Answer: Wa Mamin Da’abat
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Wa Mamin Da’abat is the 12th Para of Holy Quran
          428

          Hazrat Nooh (AH) name mentioned in the Holy Quran _____ times.

          Correct Answer: 43
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Islamic scholars agree that Noah had four sons whose names were Ham, Shem, Yam and Japheth.

          Known for: Noah's Ark
          429

          How many times the trumpet will be blown by Hazrat Israfil?

          Correct Answer: Two
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          It is believed that the Angel Israfil will blow a trumpet to announce the Day of Judgement .

          Munkar and Nakir – The angels responsible for questioning the soul of a person who has died
          430

          How many Surahs of the Holy Quran start with Bismillahir Rahmaanir Raheem?

          Correct Answer: 113
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Out of all 114 Surahs of the Quran this is the only one (Surah Tawbah) to which Bismillah isn't prefixed.

          Surah Naml is known as the Surah with two bismillahs.

          Surah Tawbah has no Bismillah Al-rahman Al-rahim
          431

          Which Jewish tribe was expelled from Madinah after the Battle of Badr?

          Correct Answer: Banu Qaynuqa
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          The Banu Qaynuqa was one of the three main Jewish tribes living in the 7th century of Medina.
          432

          Which prayer is not obligatory for women?

          Correct Answer: Juma prayer
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Friday prayer is not obligatory upon women. Women during the time of the Prophet (PBUH) attended the mosque and used to pray Jumu`ah with him.
          433

          The first Sariya was____?

          Correct Answer: Hazrat Ubaidah bin Haris (رضہ)
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Hazrat Ubaidah bin Haris (رضہ) Born c.562 Mecca,
          Hazrat Ubaidah bin Haris (          رضہ)  Died 13 March 624 (aged 61–62)
          Badr, Hejaz, Arabi
          434

          Which City Is Called Umm-Ul-Qura?

          Correct Answer: Makkah
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Umm al-Qura refer to the city of Mecca in Saudi Arabia.
          435

          What is the title of Hazrat Abdullah bin Amir?

          Correct Answer: Fath-e-Khurasan
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          In the year 647, when Abu Musa al-Ash'ari was deposed from the governorship of Basra, Caliph Uthman appointed Ibn Amir as the Governor of Basra.
          436

          Which daughters of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ were first engaged with the two sons of Abu Lahab?

          Correct Answer: Hazrat Ruqiyya R.A & Hazrat Umme Kalsoom R.A
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Abu Lahab had married two of his sons to the daughters of Muḥammad, 'Utbah to Ruqayyah and 'Utaibah to Umm Kulthum. However, the marriages were never consummated.
          437

          Which is the correct etiquette of Imam to deliver Friday Khutba?

          Correct Answer: He must face the audience and deliver Khutba
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          The Islamic tradition can be formally observed at the Dhuhr (noon) congregation prayer on Friday.
          438

          Who destroyed idol “Manat”?

          Correct Answer: Hazrat Saad Bin Zaid R.A
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          In the same month as the mission of Khalid ibn al-Walid to destroy al-Uzza and the Suwa, Sa'd bin Zaid Al-Ashhali was sent with 20 horsemen to Al-Mashallal to destroy an idol called Manāt, worshipped by the polytheist Al-Aws and Al-Khazraj tribes of Arabia.
          439

          Battle of ZALAQA was fought between Alfanso VI and ______?

          Correct Answer: Yousaf bin Tashfeen
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Date of The Battle of Sagrajas: October 23, 1086
          Location of The Battle of Sagrajas:           Badajoz, Spain
          440

          Ghazwah Widdah was fought in ___ Hijrah year?

          Correct Answer: 1st
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          BATTLES OF ISLAM MCQS
          • First Ghazwa is Widdan or Abwa in 1 A.H
          • 624 Battle of Badr.2hij
          • 625 Battle of Uhad. 3hij
          • 626 Battle of Rajih.4hij
          • 627 Battle of Khandaq (Ahzab).5hij
          • 628, Treaty of Hudaibiya, 
          Conquest of Khyber.7hij
          • 629, Battle of Mutah, Preaching of Islam to           various kings.7hij
          • 630, Battle of Hunain,           Conquest of Makkah.8hij
          • 631, Battle of Tabuk. 9hij
          • 632, Hajjat-ul-Wida.10hij

          What is the name of 29th Para of Holy Quran?

          Correct Answer: Tabarakallazi
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          The 11 surahs covered in 29th Para of Holy Quran.

          Correct Answer: 204 AH

          Died:           19 January 820 CE (aged 54); 204 AH.

          How many Muhajreen were there at the time of Mawaakhat?

          Correct Answer: 45

          Which Surah is considered as 1/4 of the Holy Quran?

          Correct Answer: Surah Kafiron
          Show explanation

          449

          What is the name of 13th Para of Holy Quran?

          Correct Answer: Wa Ma Ubrioo
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          The thirteenth Para or Juz of the Quran is Wa Ma Ubrioo (بَرِّئُوَمَا) which has 3 Surahs that are Surah Yusuf, Surah Raad, and Surah Ibrahim.

          450

          When was the meat of Donkey prohibited?

          Correct Answer: Jang-e-Khaibar
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Al-Bukhaari (5527) and Muslim (1936) narrated that Hazrat Abu Thalabah said: The Messenger of Allah forbade the meat of domesticated donkeys.

          451

          Who runs the accounts of central Zakat fund in Pakistan____?

          Correct Answer: Administrator General
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Zakat Councils are responsible for collecting and distributing the Islamic taxes known as Zakat and Ushr in Pakistan.

          The Councils are overseen by the Ministry of Religious Affairs.

          Began in 1980 with an ordinance decreed by General Muhammad Zia-ul-Haq
          452

          How many surahs of the Holy Quran start with the word Tabaraka?

          Correct Answer: 2
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          There are only two surahs of the holy Quran start with the word Tabraka.

          Which battle participants were bestowed with the highest rewards by Allah?

          Correct Answer: Badr

          Bestowed عطا کرنا

          The minimum number of people required for Jumu’ah prayer are___?

          Correct Answer: 3
          Show explanation

          455

          Which Tawaf is Also known as the Farewell Tawaf?

          Correct Answer: Tawaf Al-Wadaa
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          the Farewell Tawaf. This is the last ritual before leaving the Holy City of Makkah on completion of your Hajj or whatever you came
          456

          The kaffarah for breaking fast is to keep ______ fast for continuous days.

          Correct Answer: 60 days
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          When Halaku khan sacked Baghdad?

          Correct Answer: 1258
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Baghdad is captial of Iraq.

          Hulagu Khan,was a Mongol ruler who conquered much of Western Asia. 

          He was a grandson of Genghis Khan .

          Born: Mongolia

          Died: February 8, 1265, Zarrine River, Iran
          460

          Hazrat Isa (AS) was sent to preach the message of Allah to the people of ____?

          Correct Answer: Israel
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Injeel book was revealed on Hazrat Esa As
          461

          What is the relation of Hazrat Khadija with Warqah bin Naufal

          Correct Answer: First cousin
          Show explanation
          Explanation

          Waraqah ibn Nawfali was the paternal first cousin of Hazrat Khadija.

          He was considered a Christian priest. 

          Varqa Bin Naufal verified Prophet for the first time.

          462

          Who did Hazrat Khadija (RA) send to ask Hazrat Muhammad ﷺ about marrying her?

          Correct Answer: Friend
          Show explanation
          Explanation
          Friend of Khadija (رضہ)  Nafeesa carried the message of Nikah.

          At the time of the marriage, Hazrat Khadijah was 40 years old. Muhammad was 25 years old.

          Hazrat Khadija was the first wife of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ 


          Additional Information

          She belonged to the tribe of Banu Asad

          She married Three times in life.

          She was the daughter of  Khuwaylid ibn Asad and Fatima bint Zaidah

          Hazrat Khadija (R.A) Died on 10 Ramadan BH 3  Mecca

          She passed away when she was 65 and Prophet Muhammad ﷺ was 50 years old.

          She was buried in Jannat al-Mualla, Mecca
          463

          Hazrat Khadija (RA) is commonly regarded by Muslims as the _______.

          Correct Answer: Mother of the Muslims
          Show explanation
          Explanation
          Hazrat Khadija was the first wife of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ 

          At the time of the marriage, Hazrat Khadijah was 40 years old. Muhammad was 25 years.

          Hazrat Khadija (رضہ) belonged to the tribe of Banu Asad
          Prophet Muhammad ﷺ had three sons and four daughters.

          All of his children were born to Hazrat Khadijah (RA) except one son Ibrahim, who was born to Hazrat Maria al-Qibtiyah (RA).

          "Hazrat Khadija's"  important Questions and information

          azart Khadija (R.A) Died:

          10 Ramadan BH 3  c. 619  Mecca, Hejaz, Arabia

          *

          Hazrat Khadija (رضہ) passed away when she was ______ and Prophet Muhammad ﷺ was ____ years old.

          65 – 50

          Hazart Khadija (R.A) Resting place  

          Jannat al-Mu'alla, Mecca

          *

          Hazrat Khadija (رضہ) passed away when she was ______ and Prophet Muhammad ﷺ was ____ years old.

          65 – 50

          *

          Hazrat Khadija (رضہ) married _______ time in life.

          three

          *

          Friend of Khadija (رضہ) ____ carried message of Nikah?

          Nafeesa

          *

          Hazrat Khadija's (رضہ) Father's name was Khuwaylid ibn Asad and their mother's name was Fatima bint zaidah

          Khadijah's father was a merchant and leader.

            467

            Hazrat Khadija (رضہ) married _______ time in life.

            Correct Answer: Three
            Show explanation
            Explanation
            Khadijah married three times and had children from all her marriages.

            1.      she first married Atiq ibn 'A'idh ibn' Abdullah Al-Makhzumi

            2.      Second Malik ibn Nabash ibn Zargari ibn at-Tamimi.

            3.      Third Muhammad ﷺ

            At the time of the marriage, Hazrat Khadijah was 40 years old. Muhammad was 25 years old.

            Hazrat Khadija was the first wife of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ 

            Friend of Khadija (رضہ)  Nafeesa carried the message of Nikah.

            Holy Prophet had Four Daughters and three sons from Hazrat Khadija.


            Additional Information


            She belonged to the tribe of Banu Asad

            She married Three times in life.

            She was the daughter of  Khuwaylid ibn Asad and Fatima bint Zaidah

            Hazrat Khadija (R.A) Died on 10 Ramadan BH 3  Mecca

            She passed away when she was 65 and Prophet Muhammad ﷺ was 50 years old.

            She was buried in Jannat al-Mualla, Mecca

            ND16-3-2023

            ND16-3-2023

            470

            Hazrat Khadija (رضہ) bore all the children of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ except?

            Correct Answer: Ibrahim (رضہ)
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            At the time of the marriage, Hazrat Khadijah was 40 years old. Muhammad was 25 years.

            Hazrat Khadija was the first wife of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ 

            Prophet Muhammad ﷺ had three sons and four daughters.

            All of his children were born to Hazrat Khadijah (RA) except one son Ibrahim, who was ❤️born to Hazrat Maria al-Qibtiyah (RA).

            1. Hazrat Qasim (Prophet Muhammad ﷺ son had khadija)

            2. Hazrat Zainab (RA) (Prophet Muhammad ﷺ daughter had Khadija)

            3. Hazrat Ruqayyah (RA) (Prophet Muhammad ﷺ daughter had Khadija)

            4. Hazrat Umm Kulthum (RA) (Prophet Muhammad ﷺ daughter had Khadija)

            5. Hazrat Fatima (RA) (Prophet Muhammad ﷺ daughter had Khadija)

            6. Hazrat Abdullah (Prophet Muhammad ﷺ son had khadija)

            7. Hazrat Ibrahim (Maria al-Qibtiyah) (Prophet Muhammad ﷺ son had Hazrat Maria)

            ND16-3-2023

            471

            How many daughters Hazrat Khadija (RA) had with Hazrat Muhammad ﷺ?

            Correct Answer: Four
            Show explanation
            Explanation
            Holy Prophet had Four Daughters from Hazrat Khadija.

            1. Hazrat Zainab (married to Abual Bin Aas Bin Rabbi)
            2. Hazrat Ruqayah (married to Hazrat Usman bin Affan)
            3. Hazrat Umme Kalsoom (married with Hazrat Usman bin Affan after the death of Hazrat Ruqayah)
            4. Hazrat Fatima (married to Hazrat Ali)


            Additional Information:

            Prophet Muhammad ﷺ had three sons 
            1. Hazrat Qasim 
            2. Hazrat Abdullah
            3. Hazrat Ibrahim 

            All of his children were born to Hazrat Khadijah (RA) except one son Ibrahim, who was born to Hazrat Maria al-Qibtiyah (RA).



            472

            How many sons Hazrat Muhammad ﷺ had with Hazrat Khadija (RA)?

            Correct Answer: 2
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            At the time of the marriage, Hazrat Khadijah was 40 years old. Muhammad was 25 years.

            Hazrat Khadija was the first wife of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ 

            Prophet Muhammad ﷺ had three sons and four daughters.

            All of his children were born to Hazrat Khadijah (RA) except one son Ibrahim, who was ❤️born to Hazrat Maria al-Qibtiyah (RA).

            1. Hazrat Qasim (Prophet Muhammad ﷺ son had khadija)

            2. Hazrat Zainab (RA) (Prophet Muhammad ﷺ daughter had Khadija)

            3. Hazrat Ruqayyah (RA) (Prophet Muhammad ﷺ daughter had Khadija)

            4. Hazrat Umm Kulthum (RA) (Prophet Muhammad ﷺ daughter had Khadija)

            5. Hazrat Fatima (RA) (Prophet Muhammad ﷺ daughter had Khadija)

            6. Hazrat Abdullah (Prophet Muhammad ﷺ son had khadija)

            7. Hazrat Ibrahim (Maria al-Qibtiyah) (Prophet Muhammad ﷺ son had Hazrat Maria)

            ND16-3-2023


            473

            What was the name of Hazrat Khadija (RA) father?

            Correct Answer: Khuwaylid ibn Asad
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            Hazrat Khadija's (رضہ) Father's name was Khuwaylid ibn Asad and their mother's name was Fatima bint zaidah

            Khadijah's father was a merchant and leader.

            "Hazrat Khadija's"  important Questions and information

            First

            *

            10 Ramadan BH 3  c. 619  Mecca, Hejaz, Arabia

            *

            Jannat al-Mu'alla, Mecca

            477

            which of the following vitamin is produced in human body with the help of Sunlight.?

            Correct Answer: D
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            During exposure to sunlight 7-dehydrocholesterol in the skin absorbs UV B radiation and

            is converted to previtamin D3 which in turn isomerizes into vitamin D3.


            agm 15.3.2023


            478

            Isreal is the title of

            Correct Answer: Hazrat Yaqoob A.S
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            Yaqub was also known as Israel.

            He is the son of Ishaq (father) and Rafqa (mother)‎

            He was the grandson of Hazrat Ibrahim A.S.

            Hazrat Ishaq was the younger brother of Hazrat Ismail A.S

            He has 12 Children including Yusuf and Binyamin

            His name mentioned 16 times in the Quran

            He was born in Palestine,

            He met his son Hazrat Yousaf (AS) after a period of 40 years

            The Holy Qur'an has mentioned his story in a beautiful chapter entitled "Surah Yusuf".


            479

            What does ‘Eid ul Adha’ mean?

            Correct Answer: Festival of Sacrifice
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            Eid al-Azha in Arabic means the 'festival of the sacrifice'

            It marks the completion of Hajj

            Eid al-Azha is celebrated annually on the 10th of Dhul-Hijjah

            Commemorates Prophet Ibrahim's (Abraham's) willingness to sacrifice his son in obedience to Allah's command.


            480

            What is name of 28th Para of Holy Quran?

            Correct Answer: Qadd Sami Allah
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            Qadd Sami Allah 28th Para.
            Tabarakallazi             29th Para.
            481

            When Hazrat Imam Shafi was born in Gaza?

            Correct Answer: 150 AH
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            Imam Shafi  Born: August 28, 767 AD, Gaza
            Imam Shafi  Died: January 20, 820 AD, Fustat, Egypt
            Imam Shafi Full name: Abū ʿAbdullāh Muhammad ibn Idrīs al-Shāfiʿī
            Imam Shafi Place of burial: Imam Shafi'i Mosque, Egypt
            482

            In which Surah the creation of human beings mentioned?

            Correct Answer: Surah Hijr
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            Other name of Surah Al-Hijr is Valley
            Position Juzʼ 14
            Hizb no. 27
            No. of Rukus 6
            No. of verses 99
            483

            The Holy Quran was relieved from?

            Correct Answer: 609-632 AD
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            The Holy Quran Is Last Book Which was revealed On Hazrat Muhammad SAW. It took 23 years for completion.
            484

            In Ramadan, Farz prayer is equal to ___?

            Correct Answer: 70 Farz prayer
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            In Ramadan, Nafal prayer is equal to Farz prayer

            In Ramadan, Farz prayer is equal to 70 Farz prayer
            485

            How many surahs of the Holy Quran start with the word Alif Laam Raa?

            Correct Answer: Five
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            There are the five surah start with Alif Laam Raa and Also five surah start with surah Qul.
            486

            The literal meaning of Soam is ____?

            Correct Answer: Both a & b
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            Soam was obligatory in 2nd hijri.
            Zakat also obligatory in             2nd hijri.
            487

            How many types of fast a Muslim keeps?

            Correct Answer: Three
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            Three types of fasting are recognized by the Quran:

            1.      Ritual fasting,

            2.      Fasting as compensation for repentance (both from Quran 2),

            3.      Ascetic fasting (from Quran 33).
            488

            Which Surah is from the name of tribe of Holy Prophet?

            Correct Answer: Quraish
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            Hazrat Muhammad is born as a member of the tribe of Quraysh and the clan of Hāshim.
            489

            ___ was an eloquent speaker?

            Correct Answer: Hazrat Haroon (AS)
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            eloquent speaker روانی سے بولنا

            Hazrat Haroon was brother of Hazrat Musa As
            490

            Quran is written in ___?

            Correct Answer: Prose & Poetry
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            Quran is last book which was reveaved on Hazrar Muhammad PBUH

            نثری نظم ۔ ایک نثری تخلیق ۔ جو اپنے جذباتی لہجے

            Prose & Poetry,
            491

            At least five wisk is weight of the produce of the crops over which Zakat becomes obligatory. Five wisk is equal to____?

            Correct Answer: 40 Kg
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            wisk is equal to 40kg

            zakat became obligatory on 2nd hijri
            492

            The biggest animal mentioned in the Holy Quran is _____?

            Correct Answer: Elephant
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            There are more than 200 verses in Quran dealing with Animals.

            Six Chapters of Quran are named after animals or insects.

            The biggest animal mentioned in the Holy Quran is Elephant

            The smallest animal mentioned in Holy Quran Mosquito.

            Following Surah with the name of Animals.


            1. Surah al Baqarh (The cow)
            2. Surah al Anaam (The cattle)
            3. Sureh al Nahl (the Bees)
            4. Sureh al Namal (The Ant)
            5. Sureh Al Ankbut ( The Spider)
            6. Surah Al-Fil ( The elephant)

            ND14-7-2023

            493

            The real brother of Hazrat Yousaf A.S was

            Correct Answer: Bin Yameen
            Show explanation
            Explanation





            The real brother of Hazrat Yousaf A.S was Bin Yameen.


            The real brother of Hazrat Yousaf A.S was Bin Yameen.


            Important Question about "Hazrat Yousaf (AS)

            Prophet Yusuf (عليه السلام) was one of the twelve sons of Prophet Yaqub (AS).

            His mother's name was Raheel.

            Hazrat Yousaf (AS) remained in the well for three days.

            27 times Hazrat Yousuf was mentioned in the Holy Quran. 

            Hazrat Yousaf (AS) was sold as a slave in Egypt.

            Zulaikha bought Hazrat Yousaf (AS)

            Hazrat Yousaf's (AS) talent for interpreting dreams.

            Palestine is the grave of Hazrat Yousaf (علیہ).

            494

            Before advent of Islam, the calendar year in Arabia was:

            Correct Answer: Anno Domini
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            This calendar era is based on the traditionally reckoned year of the conception or birth of Jesus, with AD counting years from the start of this epoch and BC denoting years before the start of the era

            495

            What food is traditionally first eaten to break the fast at the end of the day?

            Correct Answer: Dates
            Show explanation
            Explanation

             traditionally eaten to break the fast since the time of the Prophet Muhammad, dates are a great way to break the fast as they provide natural sugars for energy, provide minerals like potassium, copper and manganese and are a source of fibre.

            496

            Which country has the shortest fasting hours?

            Correct Answer: Argentina
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            The number of fasting hours in Finland this year will hit 23 hours and five minutes, making it the longest to observe fasting hours in the world, together wtih other Scandinavian countries such as Norway and Sweden.

            497

            The Ring of Hazrat Muhammad was made by?

            Correct Answer: Uttaba bin Yalla
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            As for the ring of our beloved Prophet Muhammadﷺ wore a silver ring on his right hand, in it was an Abyssinian stone

            498

            Which Jamarat is nearest to Makkah_______?

            Correct Answer: Jammarat-ul-Uqba
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            The Jamarat are three stone walls, formerly pillars, which are pelted as a compulsory ritual of Hajj in emulation of the actions of the Prophet Ebrahim.

            499

            The largest Madni Surah in Quran is:

            Correct Answer: Surah Al Baqarah
            Show explanation
            Explanation
            • The largest Madni Surah of the Quran is Al Baqarah
            • *****
            • 40 Rukus in Surah Al-Baqarah
            • Al-Baqarah means: "The Heifer" or "The Cow"
            •  Al-Baqarah is the second and longest surah of the Quran.
            • Al-Baqarah  consists of 286 ayat, 6,201 words, and 25,500 letters
            • ***

            500

            حضرت موسیٰ کی والدہ نے جب آپ علیہ سلام کے تابوت کو دریا نیل میں ڈال دیا پھر کتنے دنوں بعد آپ کی شکل دیکھی _______ ؟

            Correct Answer: تین دن بعد . .
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            Moses is considered the most important prophet in Judaism and one of the most important prophets in Christianity, Islam, the Druze faith, the Baháʼí Faith and other Abrahamic religions. 

            Born: Land of Goshen

            Died: Mount Nebo, Jordan

            Nice work getting this far. Consistency beats intensity — come back tomorrow and keep stacking sets.
